projectDescription: A Bash script that automates the deployment of CasaOS on a Proxmox LXC container, turning it into a fully configured Home Media Server.
keyFeatures: Automated Debian/Ubuntu system update and dependency installation (curl, wget, git, htop, neofetch)
One-command CasaOS installation via the official IceWhaleTech installer
Automatic /DATA/Media directory structure creation for Jellyfin/Plex (Movies, TV_Shows, Downloads)
Permission hardening on media directories to prevent Docker permission issues
Built-in maintenance mode when CasaOS is already installed (password reset, service status)
Final health check that reports CasaOS service status and LAN IP access URL
publicApiSurface: casaosscript.sh — main entry-point script (run as root inside a Proxmox LXC container)
Maintenance mode option 1: Reset user password (casaos-user-service-db-util)
Maintenance mode option 2: Check CasaOS service status (systemctl status casaos)
